question: Which vehicle did I take care of first in February, the bike or the car?

retrieval_results.context:
The user had a bike gear repair in mid-February because the gears were acting up and could not shift properly
The user washed the Toyota Corolla on 2023-02-27
The user has a hybrid bike
The user took the Toyota Corolla to a dealership for a routine checkup on Friday after the check engine light came on
The user drives a Toyota Corolla
